infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Anchor uses the camera to scan food labels and blood test reports so you can log nutrition and lab markers privately.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Anchor reads photos of food labels and blood test reports that you choose to upload.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Anchor does not record audio. This permission is requested only because the web view supports it; the app never starts a recording.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Anchor does not track you across apps or websites.
